message:
test(session): add comprehensive add_all() tests

Tests for Session::add_all() method covering various collection types:

add_all with Vec:
- Verifies all items tracked with unique PKs
- Confirms pending_new count matches input

add_all with empty collection:
- Ensures no-op behavior
- Zero tracked/pending items

add_all with iterator:
- Tests iter() explicitly passed
- Validates tracking through iterator interface

add_all with slice:
- Array slice reference handling
- Confirms proper tracking

Each test uses MockConnection to verify internal state
via debug_state() returning pending_new and tracked counts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
